g.text: 5 packet classes · 2 in-kernel paths · 2 kernel-bypass paths · 1 eBPF redirect
① mgmt wire → nsa/nsb → bond → VLAN demux → IP stack → kubelet/etcd (full kernel)
② storage same path → WEKA client opens RDMA QPs on bond0.200 → bulk via RDMA verbs (kernel for control only)
③ ingress wire → bond → VLAN demux → Cilium eBPF (tc/XDP) → bpf_redirect into pod netns (skips socket layer)
④ RoCE wire → gpu0…gpu7 → RDMA verbs → DMA into GPU HBM (GPUDirect RDMA) (kernel never sees payload)
⑤ SR-IOV wire → gpu0…gpu7 eSwitch → VF → pod netns directly (skips host bond + IP stack entirely)
